title: E-commerce Product Toggle

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Toggle

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='20' y='20' rx='10' width='360' height='260' fill='#F7F7F7' stroke='#B7D7CD' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='120' y='80' rx='10' width='160' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='120' y='140' rx='10' width='160' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='120' y='110' font-family='Arial' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Price: $<tspan x='140' font-size='16'>19.99</tspan></text><text x='120' y='160' font-family='Arial' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Toggle Currency</text><g transform='translate(240, 110)'><circle cx='10' r='6' fill='#411C56'/><path d='M10 6L16 6' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M16 6L16 18' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M16 18L10 18' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M10 18L10 6' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must display product price in both USD and EUR currencies

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Toggle

gradingCriteria.description: Verify that the product price updates correctly when toggling between USD and EUR currencies.
Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
